news.title: Global markets rise as Iran war uncertainty keeps oil elevated
news.body: Markets climbed on Friday as hopes of a breakthrough in US-Iran negotiations steadied investor nerves, but with Hormuz shipping still disrupted and oil above $100, uncertainty has far from lifted.View on euronews

news.title: Uh-Oh! The Probability of an FOMC Rate Hike Is Rapidly Climbing.
news.body: President Trump and Wall Street want interest rates cut, but inflation has other plans.

news.title: UBS Global Wealth Management lifts S&P 500 target on strong consumer spending, AI demand
news.body: UBS Global Wealth ‌Management raised its ‌2026 year-end target for ​the S&P 500 to 7,900 from 7,500 previously, citing ‌resilient ⁠consumer spending and seemingly insatiable ⁠demand for data center infrastructure. In ​a note ​dated ​May…

news.title: Investor Demand for S&P 500 Downside Protection Plummets 75% Since March
news.body: S&P 500 single-stock put-call skew has plunged 75% since March to a near 20-year low, signaling complacency.

news.title: Victoria's Secret (VSCO): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q4 Earnings?
news.body: Victoria's Secret’s 32.2% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 19%, and its stock price has climbed to $44.69 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors cont…

news.title: 2 Reasons to Watch ZBRA and 1 to Stay Cautious
news.body: While the S&P 500 is up 13.2% since November 2025, Zebra (currently trading at $246.68 per share) has lagged behind, posting a return of 8%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

news.title: Stock Market Today, May 21: T1 Energy Rises on Surging Volume After Short Seller and Roth Capital Clash
news.body: After heavy trading tied to the short report and Roth’s response, T1’s next operating markers are output from its G1_Dallas module facility and financing for the G2_Austin cell project as it works to scale domestic solar capacity.

news.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures edge higher as markets await update on US-Iran peace talks
news.body: US stock futures cautiously rose as the world awaited an update on US-Iran peace talks.

news.title: Dow Jones Sets Closing High As Oil Prices Fall; Amazon, Credo Lead AI Stocks In Buy Areas
news.body: The Dow hit a record close as oil prices fell further. Amazon led AI stocks in buy areas even as Nvidia retreated.
